findings.title: host seam の spawnFn が raw 側を指すことが明示されていない
findings.rationale: materializeWorktree 内の git add/commit はすべて this.spawnFn（raw）を使い、this.wrappedSpawnFn（transport-auth ラップ済み）は使っていない（local.ts:575, 601 他）。抽出後も同じ raw spawnFn を渡す必要があるが、request.md の host seam 能力リストでは両者が区別されていない。

observations.title: コード参照の正確性を確認
observations.rationale: local.ts:483（materializeWorktree 委譲）、493-627（materializeWorktree 本体）、521・544（manager.create 2 箇所）をすべて実装コードと突合し正確であることを確認。順序不変（workspace-before-updateJobState / seed-before-updateJobState / 失敗時 remove+prune）も実コードで検証済み。

observations.title: 構造 gate test の前提が整っている
observations.rationale: workspace-materializer.ts は現状 WorktreeMaterializationPlan DU 定義のみの stub であり、manager.create 呼び出しは存在しない。抽出後に grep gate が正しく機能する前提が確認できた。

findings.title: T-03 omits private→non-private changes for cwd, manager, spawnFn, resolveSetupPlan, updateJobState
findings.rationale: T-03 explicitly mentions making `writeLivenessSidecar` non-private to satisfy `MaterializerHost`, but all five of `cwd`, `manager`, `spawnFn`, `resolveSetupPlan`, and `updateJobState` are also declared `private` in `LocalRuntime` and must become accessible for `implements MaterializerHost` to typecheck. The typecheck gate will surface this, so there is no logic risk, but the incomplete enumeration may cause mid-task confusion.

observations.title: Architecture: narrow MaterializerHost seam is correct
observations.rationale: Dependency direction is WorkspaceMaterializer → MaterializerHost ← LocalRuntime. Materializer cannot access unrelated LocalRuntime internals. Matches existing runtime conventions.

observations.title: Ordering invariants explicitly covered in spec scenarios
observations.rationale: All three invariants (workspace-before-updateJobState, seed-before-updateJobState, remove+prune-before-throw) have concrete Given/When/Then scenarios. No logic gaps found.

observations.title: Structure gate test design is well-targeted
observations.rationale: Four assertions (0 manager.create in local.ts, ≥2 in workspace-materializer.ts, ≥1 writeLivenessSidecar, ≥1 registerWorkspace) directly catch the copy-not-move failure mode identified in the request.

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: approved
